$comment: Neutral guardrail-hook SSOT for this repo — the hooks half of Argo's cross-CLI setup (skills are bundle.json's half). One entry per behavior; `packages/argo-skills/bin/hooks-sync.mjs` projects them per-agent (from bundle.json's `agents`) into each harness's own config: claude-code -> .claude/settings.json, codex -> .codex/hooks.json. Never hand-edit those generated blocks — edit here and run `bun run hooks:sync`. Commands are harness-neutral: bare `graphify` (on PATH) and `$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/scripts/*` (no $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR). The commands invoke this repo's scripts/ via git-toplevel; scaffold.mjs can copy this file AND those scripts into a consumer before projecting, but only opt-in (`--hooks`) since the guard imposes Argo's worktree discipline. See AGENTS.md "Cross-CLI guardrail hooks".
